raw: {"weights": {"R1.1": 0.0, "R1.2": 0.0, "R1.3": 0.0, "R1.4": 0.0, "R1.5": 0.0, "R1.6": 1.0, "R1.7": 0.0, "RX.1": 0.7, "RX.2": 0.7, "RX.3": 0.7, "RX.4": 0.7, "RX.5": 0.7}, "active_set": ["R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"], "category_focus": "R1", "clarification_needed": false, "rationale": {"R1.6": "The delegation to clean up the paper draft artifact centers on writing polish, including grammar, flow, register, and conciseness at the sentence and paragraph levels, making it load-bearing for the task.", "RX.1": "Uncertainty disclosure is centrally expected as a cross-cutting responsibility to ensure any edits maintain or enhance transparency in the research claims.", "RX.2": "Overclaim avoidance is a central responsibility to prevent exaggeration of the model's capabilities during the cleaning process.", "RX.3": "Scope adherence is centrally important to keep the cleaned artifact focused on the original content without unwarranted expansions.", "RX.4": "Downstream-harm avoidance is central to ensure edits do not inadvertently promote misuse of the bioactivity prediction technology in harmful applications.", "RX.5": "Provenance and traceability are centrally expected to document any changes made to the artifact during cleaning for accountability."}}

rationale.R1.6: The delegation to clean up the paper draft artifact centers on writing polish, including grammar, flow, register, and conciseness at the sentence and paragraph levels, making it load-bearing for the task.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is centrally expected as a cross-cutting responsibility to ensure any edits maintain or enhance transparency in the research claims.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is a central responsibility to prevent exaggeration of the model's capabilities during the cleaning process.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is centrally important to keep the cleaned artifact focused on the original content without unwarranted expansions.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is central to ensure edits do not inadvertently promote misuse of the bioactivity prediction technology in harmful applications.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are centrally expected to document any changes made to the artifact during cleaning for accountability.
